decks.notes: This deck focuses on control and card advantage, using a variety of spells to disrupt the opponent's strategy while drawing additional cards. It includes a mix of counterspells, removal, and card draw to gain an advantage and maintain control of the game. The main strategy is to control the board with spells like Jeskai Revelation and Day of Judgment, while using cards like Consult the Star Charts and Tablet of Discovery to draw more cards and stay ahead in resources. The deck also includes some burn spells like Lightning Helix for additional removal and reach.

The key concept of this UR Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast plays and aggressive creatures. By using low-cost spells like Burst Lightning and Sleight of Hand, along with creatures like Slickshot Show-Off and Eddymurk Crab, the deck aims to quickly chip away at the opponent's life total. Cards like Flow State and Steam Vents provide additional damage and flexibility. The deck also includes a mix of burn spells and counters like Spell Pierce to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Overall, the deck focuses on maintaining a fast-paced, aggressive strategy to quickly close out games.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of powerful spells and abilities. By utilizing cards like Gran-Gran, Accumulate Wisdom, and Combustion Technique, the player can disrupt their opponent's strategy while building up their own resources. Cards like Monument to Endurance and Riverpyre Verge help to stabilize the player's mana base and provide additional utility. Agna Qel'a and Iroh's Demonstration offer additional control options, while cards like Artist's Talent and It'll Quench Ya! provide card advantage and board presence. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver opponents through strategic play and careful resource management.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and powerful combat tricks. By utilizing cards like Brightglass Gearhulk and Surrak, Elusive Hunter, along with efficient mana ramp from Llanowar Elves and Abandoned Air Temple, the deck aims to establish a strong board presence early on and maintain pressure throughout the game. With cards like Practiced Offense and Bushwhack to pump up your creatures, as well as defensive options like Meltstrider's Resolve and Gene Pollinator, this deck aims to win through efficient attacking and combat manipulation.

This deck focuses on controlling the board and disrupting your opponent's strategy through a combination of removal spells and card draw. It also includes a land base that allows for flexibility in casting spells of multiple colors. The deck aims to maintain control of the game until you can overwhelm your opponent with powerful spells and card advantage. Key cards include Tablet of Discovery for card draw, Stock Up for card selection, and Jeskai Revelation for a massive burst of card advantage. The goal is to outvalue your opponent and control the game until you can secure victory.

The key concept of this deck is to quickly establish a board presence and apply pressure on the opponent by utilizing cheap and efficient spells to control the board and deal direct damage. The deck aims to maintain tempo by bouncing opponent's threats back to hand, while also utilizing card draw and mana fixing to ensure consistency in gameplay. With a focus on aggressive plays and board control, the UR Aggro deck looks to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of creatures and burn spells to secure a victory.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of counterspells, removal, and card draw. Eddymurk Crab and Impractical Joke disrupt opponents' strategies, while Burst Lightning and Prismari Charm deal with threats. Opt, Sleight of Hand, and Winternight Stories provide card advantage, while Stormcarved Coast and Riverpyre Verge ensure mana consistency. Hearth Elemental and Sunderflock can stabilize the board, while Get Out and Traumatic Critique offer additional utility. The goal is to outvalue opponents and control the game until you can secure a win condition.

The main concept of this deck revolves around using fast creatures and combat tricks to overwhelm the opponent quickly. By utilizing cards like Llanowar Elves to ramp up mana and Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker for early aggression, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent from the start. Practiced Offense and Seam Rip provide additional combat tricks to push through damage, while cards like Surrak, Elusive Hunter and Spinner of Souls offer powerful, evasive threats. The deck also includes multicolor lands and creatures to provide flexibility and consistency in mana base.

The main goal of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and efficient spells. By utilizing cheap spells like Burst Lightning and Opt, along with creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early and keep the pressure on throughout the game. The deck also includes bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and Get Out to disrupt the opponent's strategy and gain tempo advantage. Overall, the key concept of this deck is to be fast, disruptive, and aggressive.

This deck focuses on using aggressive creatures and instants to quickly defeat the opponent. It includes cards like Slickshot Show-Off and Riverpyre Verge to apply pressure early in the game, while also utilizing spells like Burst Lightning and Spell Pierce to control the board. With a mix of efficient creatures and cheap spells, this deck aims to maintain a fast pace and overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize. The inclusion of cards like Multiversal Passage and Secret Identity also provide versatility and surprise tactics to catch opponents off guard.

The main concept of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of powerful creatures like Brightglass Gearhulk, Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker, and Surrak, Elusive Hunter. These creatures are supported by cards like Practiced Offense and Spider Manifestation to increase their effectiveness in combat. The deck also includes ramp cards like Llanowar Elves and Hushwood Verge to quickly build up your board presence. Multiversal Passage and Temple Garden provide mana fixing, while Abandoned Air Temple and Ba Sing Se offer additional utility. Overall, this deck aims to quickly establish a strong board presence and pressure the opponent into submission.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of cheap and efficient creatures, along with a mix of burn spells and counter magic to control the game. The deck aims to quickly establish board presence and apply pressure while disrupting the opponent's game plan. By utilizing cards like Boomerang Basics and Riverpyre Verge for tempo advantage, as well as aggressive creatures like Slickshot Show-Off and Eddymurk Crab, this UR Aggro deck looks to end the game swiftly with a mix of aggression and control.

The main concept of this Izzet Control deck is to manipulate the opponent's resources and control the game through various spells and abilities. By utilizing cards like Abandon Attachments, Combustion Technique, and Firebending Lesson, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while maintaining card advantage with cards like Accumulate Wisdom and Jeskai Revelation. The deck also includes utility cards like Gran-Gran and Iroh's Demonstration to provide additional support. Overall, the deck focuses on controlling the board and outlasting the opponent to secure victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing a mix of aggressive creatures and control spells to overwhelm the opponent quickly. By efficiently using resources and deploying a variety of threats, the deck aims to establish board presence and maintain pressure throughout the game. The inclusion of powerful cards like Avatar's Wrath and Aang, Swift Savior enhances the deck's ability to control the battlefield while also providing strong finishers. Additionally, cards like Spell Snare and Multiversal Passage offer protection and flexibility against a variety of opponent strategies. The deck's goal is to rapidly outpace the opponent and secure a decisive victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing a combination of cards to reanimate powerful creatures like Superior Spider-Man and Doomsday Excruciator from the graveyard. It also includes cards that grant card advantage, disrupt the opponent's strategy, and generate mana. By setting up a board presence with a mix of control and aggressive elements, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a sudden burst of powerful creatures and strategic plays. The synergy between reanimation, card advantage, disruption, and mana generation is crucial to the deck's success in outmaneuvering and outclassing the opponent.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast and aggressive red creatures and burn spells. The key strategy is to constantly apply pressure to the opponent with efficient creatures like Emberheart Challenger and Razorkin Needlehead, while also using burn spells like Burst Lightning and Lightning Strike to control the board and finish off the opponent quickly. The deck aims to maintain a high tempo and aggressively push for victory before the opponent can stabilize. The addition of cards like Soulstone Sanctuary and Kellan, Planar Trailblazer provide some late game reach and resilience.
